name: clearvo
description: Submit e-invoices, calculate global tax (VAT/GST/sales tax), and validate tax numbers via the Clearvo API
long_description: Connects Claude to the Clearvo tax compliance API. Submit B2B e-invoices to national tax authorities (SDI, KSeF, ANAF, SII, NAV, myDATA, Peppol, and more), calculate VAT/GST/sales tax across 100+ countries, and validate business tax numbers against official registries (VIES, HMRC, ABN Lookup, and others). Requires a free Clearvo account — create one at https://app.clearvo.io/register.

tools.name: submit_invoice
tools.description: Submit a B2B invoice to a national tax authority for clearance or registration

tools.name: poll_status
tools.description: Check the clearance status of a previously submitted invoice

tools.name: calculate_tax
tools.description: Calculate VAT/GST/sales tax for a transaction across 100+ countries

tools.name: validate_tax_number
tools.description: Validate a business tax number against the official authority for that country

tools.name: validate_tax_numbers_batch
tools.description: Validate up to 20 tax numbers in a single request

tools.name: list_entities
tools.description: List the business entities registered under this Clearvo account

tools.name: create_entity
tools.description: Create a new business entity and receive an entity-scoped API key

tools.name: get_requirements
tools.description: Get e-invoicing and tax requirements for a specific country

tools.name: list_invoices
tools.description: List invoices previously submitted through Clearvo

tools.name: get_invoice
tools.description: Fetch complete detail for a single invoice

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List the product catalogue for an entity

tools.name: create_product
tools.description: Create a product in the catalogue with a pre-classified tax category

tools.name: update_product
tools.description: Update a product, most commonly its tax category

tools.name: list_webhooks
tools.description: List registered webhook endpoints

tools.name: create_webhook
tools.description: Register a webhook endpoint for invoice status events

tools.name: delete_webhook
tools.description: Deactivate a webhook endpoint

tools.name: list_registrations
tools.description: List tax registrations and obligations for an entity

tools.name: add_registration
tools.description: Record a new tax registration for an entity

tools.name: set_registration_collection
tools.description: Set the date from which a tax registration starts collecting tax

tools.name: list_tax_calculations
tools.description: List committed tax calculations

tools.name: get_setup_status
tools.description: Check account setup/onboarding status

tools.name: get_tax_settings
tools.description: Get tax settings for an entity

tools.name: update_tax_settings
tools.description: Update tax settings for an entity

api_key.title: Clearvo API Key
api_key.description: From app.clearvo.io/settings — starts with csk_live_ or csk_test_

entity_id.title: Entity ID (optional)
entity_id.description: Only needed with an account-scoped API key operating across multiple entities. Leave blank for entity-scoped keys, or run list_entities to find it.
